topics.title: New York and New Jersey Election Candidates
topics.summary: The studio discusses various local and state candidates for the upcoming election, including debates over scandals involving several officials and the complexities of choosing between candidates in the voting booth.

topics.title: Political Commentary and Personal Grooming Debates
topics.summary: The studio features a series of segments covering political figures like Hillary Clinton and John McCain, the Iraq War's impact on soldiers, and a lengthy discussion regarding personal grooming preferences and appearances in FHM magazine.

topics.title: Borat Film Success and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the commercial success of the film Borat, the controversial commentary from conservative columnist Debbie Schleschel regarding its content, a fan's feedback on Howard TV, David Hasselhoff's outreach, and Lance Armstrong's marathon performance.

topics.title: Media Blunders and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses various topics including a news broadcast error involving the word "cock," reports on Iraq, Anna Nicole Smith's bizarre interview clips, and an upcoming performance by Artie Lange.

topics.title: Dice Clay Comedy Special Feedback
topics.summary: The studio reviews a controversial and poorly received radio broadcast of a Dice Clay comedy set, addressing listener complaints about the audio quality and his interactions with a rowdy crowd.

topics.title: Artie Lange's Weight Loss and Club Experiences
topics.summary: The studio features Artie Lange discussing his experiences at a Boston club called Mantra, the quality of house music, and a humorous exchange regarding a weight loss program.

topics.title: Caller Interview with Debbie Davids
topics.summary: The studio hosts a phone call with a woman from South Dakota who shares details about her past experiences and personal history.

topics.title: Televangelist Scandal and Sexual Immorality
topics.summary: The studio discusses a report on televangelist Ted Haggard, who admitted to sexual immorality and receiving massages from a man while leading a large religious organization.

topics.title: Anointed Olive Oil Soap and Preacher Parodies
topics.summary: The studio features a segment discussing religious products like anointed soap and prayer wax, followed by a discussion of radio show production and upcoming guest appearances.

topics.title: Airport Pranks and Political Commentary
topics.summary: The studio features a series of segments including a discussion on inappropriate behavior during flights, a review of prank calls made to a bakery, and an analysis of political candidates and their qualifications.

topics.title: Personal Grooming and Celebrity Appearances
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation regarding personal grooming habits, experiences with paranormal television shows, and observations on celebrity appearances in media.

topics.title: Artie Lange and Howard Stern News Segment
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including Artie Lange's upcoming performances, reports on an arrest involving a concealed weapon, and discussions regarding personal struggles with substance abuse.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Gossip
topics.summary: The studio discusses various celebrity news items including Chris Rock's divorce, Rosie O'Donnell's role on The View, George Lucas's filmmaking plans, and Madonna's public image.

topics.title: Saddam Hussein Sentencing and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio covers the sentencing of Saddam Hussein, various celebrity news including Ricky Martin's adopted children and a new book by Gail Haggard, and upcoming comedy performances.
